message:
Reformat scanf test asserts to multi-line for rustfmt conformance

Cosmetic-only change in `crates/frankenlibc-core/src/stdio/scanf.rs`
test module. Three `assert_eq!` invocations whose right-hand side was
`Some(ScanOperationKind::String)` / `Some(ScanOperationKind::Scanset)`
fit on a single line but only just — recent rustfmt settings in this
workspace wrap them across multiple lines. Pre-emptively wrap them
here so `cargo fmt --check` stays clean across rust-toolchain
updates.

No behavioral change; same assertions, same operands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
